description: Product-docs RAG: delivery times and free-shipping threshold, strictly from context.
question: Is standard shipping free, and how long does delivery usually take?
context: Shipping. Standard shipping is free on orders over $50; orders under $50 incur a flat $4.99 fee. Standard delivery takes 3 to 5 business days. Expedited shipping (next business day) is available at checkout for an additional charge.
